description:
You are an automation specialist who has just cloned an infrastructure-as-code repository into /home/user/projects/deploy.  
Inside that directory you will find two configuration files that must be patched and a small status log that must be produced:

1. /home/user/projects/deploy/config.yaml  
2. /home/user/projects/deploy/settings.toml  

Your job is to:
A) update several existing keys,  
B) introduce a few new keys/tables, and  
C) write a verification log named /home/user/projects/deploy/update_log.txt.

Constraints & precise result expected:

–––– config.yaml ––––
• app.version must become the quoted string "1.3.0" (exactly).  
• app.env must become the quoted string "production" (exactly).  
• services.auth.enabled must be switched from true → false.  
• services.auth.port must be changed to 9090.  
• A completely new sibling service block named worker must be added **after** the api block with the following exact structure and indentation (2 spaces per level):

  worker:
    enabled: true
    port: 7070

The overall indentation of config.yaml must remain two spaces per nesting level and there must be a single blank line between the app section and the services section, exactly as in the original file.

Final desired YAML (for your reference)  
app:  
··name: "AcmeApp"  
··version: "1.3.0"  
··env: "production"  

services:  
··auth:  
····enabled: false  
····port: 9090  
··api:  
····enabled: true  
····port: 9000  
··worker:  
····enabled: true  
····port: 7070  

–––– settings.toml ––––
• [general].timeout must be changed from 30 → 45.  
• [features].metrics must be switched from false → true.  
• A new table must be appended to the bottom of the file exactly as shown:

[database]
type = "postgres"
pool_size = 20

Each key/value line must keep a single space on each side of the “=” sign and the file must end with a single trailing newline.

–––– update_log.txt ––––
After patching both configuration files, create /home/user/projects/deploy/update_log.txt containing exactly eight newline-separated lines in the following order (no extra spaces and a single trailing newline at the very end):

CONFIG_YAML_VERSION=1.3.0
CONFIG_YAML_ENV=production
AUTH_ENABLED=false
AUTH_PORT=9090
WORKER_SERVICE_PRESENT=yes
SETTINGS_TOML_TIMEOUT=45
SETTINGS_TOML_METRICS=true
DATABASE_TABLE_PRESENT=yes

Hints for the shell session (not actual commands):
• A couple of well-placed sed and echo commands are enough; keep it to a simple 2–3-command solution if possible.  
• Make sure you stay inside /home/user/projects/deploy while editing.  
• The automated grader will verify byte-for-byte equality of the final three files, so watch quoting, spacing, newlines, and indentation carefully.

When you are done, the grader should find patched YAML/TOML files exactly as described and the verification log containing the eight lines above.
truth:
Initial files present before the agent begins:

1. /home/user/projects/deploy/config.yaml  
Contents (with Unix LF newlines):
app:
  name: "AcmeApp"
  version: "1.2.3"
  env: "staging"

services:
  auth:
    enabled: true
    port: 8080
  api:
    enabled: true
    port: 9000

2. /home/user/projects/deploy/settings.toml  
Contents:
[general]
owner = "devops team"
timeout = 30

[features]
logging = true
metrics = false

No update_log.txt exists yet.

Expected final state after successful execution:

1. /home/user/projects/deploy/config.yaml  
app:
  name: "AcmeApp"
  version: "1.3.0"
  env: "production"

services:
  auth:
    enabled: false
    port: 9090
  api:
    enabled: true
    port: 9000
  worker:
    enabled: true
    port: 7070

2. /home/user/projects/deploy/settings.toml  
[general]
owner = "devops team"
timeout = 45

[features]
logging = true
metrics = true

[database]
type = "postgres"
pool_size = 20

(Each file ends with a single trailing newline.)

3. /home/user/projects/deploy/update_log.txt  
CONFIG_YAML_VERSION=1.3.0
CONFIG_YAML_ENV=production
AUTH_ENABLED=false
AUTH_PORT=9090
WORKER_SERVICE_PRESENT=yes
SETTINGS_TOML_TIMEOUT=45
SETTINGS_TOML_METRICS=true
DATABASE_TABLE_PRESENT=yes

(This file also ends with a single trailing newline.)

Permissions:
• Directory /home/user/projects/deploy is owned by user and writable (0700).  
• All initial files are 0644 and owned by user.

These byte-exact contents will be used by the automated test suite to validate the agent’s work.
name: task_000000_550c4dc3
